step_rationale: Adipocyte FABP4 reflects lipid metabolism dysregulation and atherosclerotic plaque instability.
mechanism: Adipocyte fatty acid-binding protein 4 reflects lipid trafficking and plaque instability, predicting atherosclerotic progression and adverse events.

references.title: Multi-omics data integration from patients with carotid stenosis illuminates key molecular signatures of atherosclerotic instability.
Use of proteomics to identify biomarkers associated with chronic kidney disease and long-term outcomes in patients with myocardial infarction.
FABP4 and Cardiovascular Events in Peripheral Arterial Disease.
Circulating FABP4 is a prognostic biomarker in patients with acute coronary syndrome but not in asymptomatic individuals.
